summary: Travel business app showcasing car rental services with vehicle fleet, pricing information, and contact details
architectural_notes: Business showcase app with static content (car photos, pricing, contact)
Focus on visual presentation with cool color palette

existing_features.title: Display a fleet showcase section featuring five car models: Dzire, Kia, Urbania, Etios, and Crysta. Each car should be presented with its photo and name.
Display contact number 9878784024 prominently on the main page with clear visibility and easy accessibility for users to call.
Create a services description section that highlights 'All drivers are hardworking and good behavior' as the key service quality message.
Display comprehensive pricing information: ₹16 per km for distance-based pricing, ₹1500 per day for rental cars, Chandigarh round trip ₹3800, Jalandhar ₹1500, and Ludhiana ₹2999.
Add a call-to-action section encouraging users to contact the mobile number for more information.
Implement a cool color scheme for the application background and overall design theme, using calming colors like blues, teals, or cool grays with appropriate contrast for readability.
Remove Toyota Crysta from the fleet showcase section in FleetShowcase.tsx, eliminating its card, image reference, and all associated display information
Remove Urbania from the fleet showcase section in FleetShowcase.tsx, eliminating its card, image reference, and all associated display information

new_feature_requests.summary: Display car fleet photos (Dzire, Kia, Urbania, Etios, Crysta)
Add service description highlighting hardworking drivers and good behavior
Display pricing: ₹16/km, ₹1500/day rental, Chandigarh round trip ₹3800, Jalandhar ₹1500, Ludhiana ₹2999
Implement cool color scheme for app background
Prepare app for Play Store publication
